title: Bug in evaluating (defined) expression with undef bits
body:
--- Author Name: **Clifford Wolf** (@cliffordwolf) Original Redmine Issue: 764 from https://www.veripool.org Original Date: 2014-05-10 Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder) --- This should set y=1, but verilator 6ce2a52 sets y=0 instead. ```module issue_042(y); output [3:0] y; localparam [3:0] p11 = 1'bx; assign y = ~&p11; endmodule ``` Self-contained test case:
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test013.v
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test013.cc
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test013.sh
